summary: Deprecated HHS COVID-19 timeseries dataset estimating inpatient beds occupied by COVID-19 patients by state. Columns include estimated bed counts and percentages with lower/upper bounds, state, collection date, and geocoded state.

Deprecated HHS COVID-19 timeseries dataset estimating ICU beds occupied by state. Columns include staffed adult ICU bed counts (estimated and total), percentage occupied with lower/upper bounds, state, collection date, and geocoded state.

HHS Data Inventory metadata catalog of public and non-public data assets across HHS agencies. Columns include access level, organization, keywords, asset title, contact email and name, description, modified date, data owner, and data category.

Deprecated HHS COVID-19 timeseries dataset estimating total inpatient beds occupied by state. Columns include estimated inpatient bed counts and percentages with lower/upper bounds, total inpatient beds, state, collection date, and geocoded state.

Deprecated HHS COVID-19 estimated patient impact and hospital capacity by state. Columns include staffed adult ICU bed occupancy rates, COVID-19 inpatient percentages with confidence bounds, collection date, state, and geocoded state.
HHS Data Governance Board membership roster listing members and their organizational roles. Columns include first name, last name, title, organization, and board role.
HHS Office of Medicare Hearings and Appeals (OMHA) operating plan for FY2024. Columns include Medicare hearings and appeals activities with FY2023 and FY2024 values.

HHS System of Records Notices (SORNs) metadata inventory providing machine-readable access to over 200 HHS Privacy Act systems. Columns include office, SORN type, agency, organization, SORN name, and SORN number.

HHS Public Health and Social Services Emergency Fund (PHSSEF) operating plan for FY2024. Columns include Administration for Strategic Preparedness and Response (ASPR) activities with FY2023 and FY2024 values.
